I learned nothing more from Sicca in person than from his letter
you will, if you think fit, bring Cicero in too
de Triario bene interpretaris voluntatem meam

ut scribis Aledium dicere

I do not want my brother Quintus to have any of the business in hand

as you write Aledius says he is
